name: Hawaii DCCA PVL Contractor License Search

agency.name: Hawaii Department of Commerce and Consumer Affairs Professional and Vocational Licensing

updateFrequency: unknown; verify against the official PVL license search before relying on freshness assumptions
licenseTypesIncluded: Hawaii contractor license records exposed by DCCA PVL public license search
knownExclusions: This source entry is scoped to professional and vocational licensing records and does not represent every business registration, local permit, or tax record in Hawaii.
Business Check and complaint-history resources are separate public tools and are not modeled as normalized license records in this entry.
License classifications and personnel relationships need follow-up review before adapter work.
rateLimitNotes: No adapter is implemented. Do not bypass portal controls; prefer official export options if discovered.
publicRecordsNotes: Official DCCA PVL lookup metadata only. Absence from this source is not proof that a license, business registration, or local authorization does not exist elsewhere.
officialBulkDownloadNotes: No official bulk download has been confirmed in this phase.
researchNotes: Registry-only source for Hawaii DCCA PVL contractor license search. Future work should research classification mapping and whether the public search exposes stable result fields.
maintainerNotes: Keep DCCA PVL licensing separate from Hawaii business registration and complaint-history tools.
